<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\DataCollector; /** * LateDataCollectorInterface. * * @author Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> */ interface LateDataCollectorInterface { /** * Collects data as late as possible. * * @return void */ public function lateCollect(); }
